name: Spinach Omelet
shortSteps: Whisk eggs with a splash of milk.
Saute spinach until wilted.
Pour eggs, fold with cheese, and cook until set.

name: Creamy Pasta Bake
shortSteps: Mix cooked pasta with chopped leftovers and milk.
Top with cheese and bake until golden.

name: Vegetable Stir Fry
shortSteps: Heat oil in a pan and add sliced vegetables.
Cook on high heat with soy sauce for 6-8 minutes.

name: Chicken Lettuce Wraps
shortSteps: Cook minced chicken with chopped onion and carrot.
Season and spoon into lettuce leaves.

name: Berry Yogurt Parfait
shortSteps: Layer yogurt, berries, and oats in a glass.
Serve chilled.

name: Leftover Rice Frittata
shortSteps: Mix leftovers with eggs and chopped spinach.
Cook in skillet and finish under broiler with cheese.

name: Banana Pancakes
shortSteps: Mash banana and mix with eggs and oats.
Cook small rounds in a greased pan until golden.

name: Tomato Egg Scramble
shortSteps: Saute chopped onion and tomato until soft.
Add beaten eggs and scramble until just set.

name: Garlic Butter Mushrooms on Toast
shortSteps: Saute mushrooms and garlic in butter until golden.
Serve over toasted bread.

name: Greek Salad
shortSteps: Chop tomatoes, cucumber, and onion.
Toss with olive oil and top with feta.

name: Avocado Toast
shortSteps: Toast bread and mash avocado on top.
Add sliced tomato and a fried egg.

name: Potato Soup
shortSteps: Boil diced potato and onion until tender.
Blend with milk, season, and top with cheese.

name: Carrot Ginger Soup
shortSteps: Saute onion and ginger, add chopped carrots and water.
Simmer 20 min, blend smooth, stir in a splash of milk.

name: Chicken Fried Rice
shortSteps: Stir-fry chicken with onion and carrot.
Push to the side, scramble eggs, mix in cooked rice with soy sauce.

name: Beef Stir Fry
shortSteps: Slice beef thin and stir-fry on high heat.
Add vegetables and toss with soy sauce and garlic.

name: Tuna Pasta
shortSteps: Cook pasta and drain.
Mix with canned tuna, diced tomato, and sauteed onion.

name: Salmon with Vegetables
shortSteps: Season salmon and bake at 200°C for 15 min.
Roast broccoli and carrots with garlic alongside.

name: Lentil Soup
shortSteps: Saute onion and garlic, add lentils and diced tomato.
Cover with water and simmer 25 min until tender.

name: Chickpea Curry
shortSteps: Fry onion and garlic with curry powder.
Add chickpeas and tomato, simmer 15 min.

name: Egg Fried Rice
shortSteps: Stir-fry onion and carrot, push aside and scramble eggs.
Mix in leftover rice and season with soy sauce.

name: French Toast
shortSteps: Whisk eggs with milk and dip bread slices.
Fry until golden and serve with sliced banana.

name: Smoothie Bowl
shortSteps: Blend banana and berries with yogurt until smooth.
Pour into a bowl and top with oats.

name: Zucchini Fritters
shortSteps: Grate zucchini and squeeze out moisture.
Mix with egg, cheese, and onion, fry until golden.

name: Baked Potato
shortSteps: Prick potato and bake at 200°C for 50 min.
Split and top with butter and cheese.

name: Mushroom Pasta
shortSteps: Saute mushrooms and garlic in butter.
Toss with cooked pasta and parmesan.

name: Tomato Soup
shortSteps: Roast tomatoes, onion, and garlic in oven.
Blend with stock and season to taste.

name: Caprese Salad
shortSteps: Slice tomatoes and mozzarella alternately.
Drizzle with olive oil and season.

name: Broccoli Cheese Soup
shortSteps: Saute onion, add broccoli and milk, simmer 15 min.
Blend partially and stir in cheese.

name: Apple Oat Porridge
shortSteps: Cook oats with milk over medium heat.
Stir in grated apple and a pinch of cinnamon.

name: Cucumber Yogurt Dip
shortSteps: Grate cucumber and squeeze out liquid.
Mix with yogurt and crushed garlic, chill before serving.
